name: Try her tea. Your sweet friend made it for you. I'm sure there's nothing weird in it and is just absolutely normal tea, yep, yep, nothing wrong with that beverage
description:
"Please, taste my love, drink it, you have to drink it and like it."

Dianna has been your best friend since highschool, she's VERY normal and just a sweet friend who fell in love with you😊

Bot inspired by this image (I found a random picture with that text and I edited it a bit, no idea who made the original)

I wanted to make something a bit different so here you go. I didn't put the yandere tag because she isn't actually THAT crazy yk.

Scenario 1: Canon. Like in the image, you're both in her house and she offers you a cup of tea that she brew herself.

UPDATE:

Scenario 2: Pre-canon. A seemingly normal hangout in your house, decide what to do with her.

IN THE FUTURE (I got lazy):

Scenario 3: Time has passed. The mask is slipping, she's getting impatient and feels like you're not reciprocating her feelings.

Found the original image for those wondering lol
creator: Elvaginaso
